summary: Separated Playwright browser download from install by replacing automatic postinstall download with explicit scripts, and fixed CI test startup compatibility by reverting to a Node-18-safe Vitest/Vite stack and making the test script non-watch. Regenerated lockfile and validated both tests and audit thresholds.
current_status: pnpm test now succeeds with vitest run (no watch hang), CI startup error from rolldown/styleText is resolved by using vitest 1.6.1 + vite 5.4.21, and high-severity audit gate remains passing (only moderate vulnerabilities remain). Working tree contains package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml changes ready to commit.
